mnemonics: Adaboost = Always Delivering Accuracy Based On Strategy
keyPoints: Key point 1: Boosting is a technique used in ensemble learning to improve the accuracy of a model by combining multiple weak models.
Key point 2: Subagging is a variant of bagging that uses only the majority class to create new training sets.
Key point 3: Random Subagging is a variant of subagging that uses random selection to create new training sets.
